name: chosen/timeline-strip
title: Timeline Strip
description: Horizontal milestone strip — 4 nodes connected by a line. Used for the 'Why Chosen now?' generational arc (2026 Chosen → 2027 WYD → 2028 IEC → 2033 Redemption Anniversary).

headline.default: The Church is building toward something — and you're part of it.

default.name: Chosen
default.description: Four days at La Trobe University, Melbourne. Where this generation gets rooted.

default.description: A global gathering of young Catholics, hosted by South Korea.

default.description: The 54th IEC — the Real Presence of Jesus celebrated, on Australian soil.

default.name: Anniversary of the Redemption
default.description: The 2000th anniversary of the Redemption of Jesus Christ.
